creator: arundel@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

Mark this PR as suspended. In order to *really* fix this issue (as bde pointed 
out) it isn't sufficient to simply switch to the newest POSIX specs. One has to 
actually go through all the various POSIX specs and check when limits were 
adjusted. These changes have to be #ifdef'ed, so backward compatility with 
previous POSIX variants doesn't get thrown over board.
